title: Bootstrap fast-path: claim-close recursion slice
body: Galactic Transiting Orbit / codex / GPT-5 / 019e18 started Wave 3 T-CQ-UX claim-close-cycle and fingerprint-recursion hardening. Active claims registry has zero live claims; historical commit_queue entries are abandoned. Treating the dirty active/closed claim ledgers from Embered Burning Magma's F-11 handoff as evidence for this slice, not peer work. Intended scope: agent-tools commit-queue/collaboration-state code and tests plus directly paired plan/status/session lifecycle surfaces.
